{{Infobox group
| name = Champions
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Champions Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Champions are legendary, superhuman warriors associated with the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]], which is one of the oldest [[Imperial Guilds]]. Historically, they have played a massive role in the unification of the [[Empire]], and their presence on a battlefield is often enough to force an enemy's surrender. They are characterized by extreme physical density and strength, making them much heavier than they appear. While they can be engaged in duels or exhibition matches for income, they are considered nearly impossible to defeat in actual combat. Because of their immense power, specialized teams of alchemists are often required just to restrain them rather than attempt to kill them. A [[Champion]]'s power is derived from a secret, proprietary alchemical process. From an early age, they undergo an abusive regimen of combat training and mental conditioning designed to instill the belief that victory is their only virtue. These alchemical treatments enhance their physical and mental attributes, granting them superior constitution and resistance to poisons. While they are more than just [[Soulbound]], some notable individuals within the group possess [[Vessels]]. The [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] is symbolized by the [[Golden Crown]]. Although the [[Guild]] was historically a cornerstone of the [[Empire]], its leadership has faced periods of dissolution and political instability. Despite their reputation for neutrality or absolute dedication to a cause, the actions of even a small number of Champions can shift the balance of power in major conflicts.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Champions]] are a group mentioned in comparison to the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Champions]] are one of the [[Imperial Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Champions]] are raised from an early age on an abusive regimen of training and combat.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Champions]] are given resistance to poison as one of their many gifts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Champions]] have hunting parties that are sabotaged by [[Greenwardens]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Champions are superhuman warriors created through a secret process and trained from birth to be unstoppable in combat. As the second oldest [[Imperial]] [[Guild]] after the [[Consultants]], they are known for disregarding stealth and moving in straight lines toward their targets. Although [[Calder]] once feared they might punish him for listening to treason, the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] has since been dissolved, leaving only individual members behind. While some Champions have remained neutral or potentially disbanded, others can still be found on the deck of the [[Navigator]]'s ship.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Champions]] are superhuman products of a secret process, trained from birth to be unstoppable in battle.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] feared the [[Champions]] might punish him for listening to treason.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Champions]] have remained neutral or possibly disbanded.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Champions]] do not concern themselves with stealth and kill in a straight line to their targets.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] has been dissolved, leaving only individual [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Champions]] are the second oldest [[Imperial]] [[Guild]], following the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|There are [[Champions]] on the deck of the [[Navigator]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Every member of the [[Champions]]' [[Guild]] is a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Champions]] could tip the balance of power.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Champions]] are a group of people rumored to be high in combat status.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Champions]] are entities that must be fought through.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Champions are warriors belonging to [[Calder]] who maintain a chapter house located on Peregrine Street. Although three of these battle-built individuals were recently killed, the group is known for not giving up easily. During an encounter with alchemists, they faced various assaults involving traps, adhesive, darts, and gas. Ultimately, [[Kelarac]] deployed the Champions to save [[Calder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champions]] were attacked by alchemists using gas, darts, traps, and adhesive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champions]] do not give up easily.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champions]] are individuals built for battle.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champions]] are warriors belonging to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Three [[Champions]] were recently killed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champions]] have a chapter house on Peregrine street.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] sent the [[Champions]] to save [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Champions are described as being sticky and poisoned, possessing bodies that adapt uniquely to [[Kameira grafts]] and alchemical augmentations. Because they require more potent and frequent drinks than others, their physical needs are distinct. Following the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], the group ceased taking any official actions for the [[Guild]]. During a specific conflict, the Champions faced certain defeat because [[Estyr]] and her [[Vessels]] were not present to assist them. As part of a larger scheme, those loyal to [[Calder]] were systematically removed, and by the conclusion of the battle, two of the Champions had vanished.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champions]] entering the fight without [[Estyr]] and her [[Vessels]] meant an instant defeat.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]] are described as sticky and poisoned.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]] require more and stronger drinks than anyone else.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]] have bodies that adapt differently to alchemical augmentations and [[Kameira grafts]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champions]] haven't taken any official [[Guild]] actions since shortly after [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s death.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]] loyal to [[Calder]] were being removed as part of a plan.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The two [[Champions]] were gone after the battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Four more silhouettes stepped up to the edge of the ship, outlined in sunlight. “More Champions, yes, as I thought.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Champions don’t give up easily. Even when they’re already dead.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
